title: grevillea coccinea subsp. coccinea
intro: Grevillea coccinea subsp. coccinea, also known as the Western Red Grevillea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Proteaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Grevillea coccinea subsp. coccinea include the potential relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its potential to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Grevillea coccinea subsp. coccinea include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
